app.name: 🔄 CryptoSwapBot
app.tagline: Instant crypto swaps · Non-custodial · No registration

welcome.new_user:
🔄 *CryptoSwapBot*

Welcome! Swap crypto instantly from WhatsApp.

*How it works:*
1️⃣ Send *swap* to start
2️⃣ Choose source & destination currency
3️⃣ Enter the amount
4️⃣ Confirm and get the address
5️⃣ Send your funds and receive confirmation

900+ cryptos · Fixed rates · No KYC

Send *swap* for your first exchange.
Send *help* for all commands.
welcome.returning:
🔄 *CryptoSwapBot*

Ready for another swap?

Send *swap* to start.
Send *help* for commands.

swap.select_source:
📤 *Which currency are you sending?*

Choose a category or type the name/ticker:
swap.select_dest:
📥 *Which currency do you want to receive?*

Choose a category or type the name/ticker:
swap.enter_amount:
💰 *{from_currency} → {to_currency}*

Enter the amount in {from_currency}:
Min: {min_amount} | Max: {max_amount}

Reply with the number.
swap.invalid_amount: ❌ Invalid amount. Please enter a valid number.
swap.amount_below_min: ❌ Minimum amount: {min_amount} {currency}. Try a larger amount.
swap.amount_above_max: ❌ Maximum amount: {max_amount} {currency}. Try a smaller amount.
swap.estimating: ⏳ Calculating the best rate for you...
swap.confirm:
📋 *Confirm swap*

📤 You send: {from_amount} {from_currency} ({from_network})
📥 You receive: ~{to_amount} {to_currency} ({to_network})

💱 Rate: 1 {from_currency} = {rate} {to_currency}
⏱ Estimated time: {time_min}-{time_max} min

Reply *yes* to confirm or *no* to cancel.
swap.cancelled: ❌ Swap cancelled. Send *swap* for a new one.
swap.expired: ⏰ Session expired. Send *swap* to start again.

status.waiting:
⏳ Waiting for your deposit on {network} network...

Make sure to send the exact amount to the provided address.
status.confirming:
🔍 Confirming your transaction on {network} network...

This may take a few minutes depending on congestion.
status.exchanging:
🔄 Swapping {from_currency} → {to_currency}...

Processing at the best rate.
status.sending:
📤 Sending {to_currency} to your address on {network}...

Almost done.
status.finished:
🎉 *Swap completed!*

You received {to_amount} {to_currency} at your address.

ID: `{exchange_id}`

Thanks for using CryptoSwapBot 🚀
status.failed:
❌ *Swap failed*

ID: `{exchange_id}`
Reason: {reason}

Your funds will be automatically refunded.
Contact support if needed.
status.refunded:
↩️ *Funds refunded*

ID: `{exchange_id}`

Your deposit has been returned to the source address.
status.overdue:
⏰ The swap is taking longer than expected.

ID: `{exchange_id}`
Status: {status}

I'll notify you when it completes.

swap.completed:
🎉 Swap completed successfully!

Send *swap* for another exchange.
swap.error: ⚠️ Error processing swap. Try again in a few minutes.

help.title: ❓ *CryptoSwapBot Help*
help.commands:
*Available commands:*
• *swap* — Start an exchange
• *help* — This menu
• *status* — View active swap status
• *lang en|es|pt|fr* — Change language
• *cancel* — Cancel current swap
help.howto:
*How to swap?*
1️⃣ Send *swap*
2️⃣ Choose source currency (what you send)
3️⃣ Choose source network
4️⃣ Choose destination currency (what you receive)
5️⃣ Choose destination network
6️⃣ Enter the amount
7️⃣ Confirm the rate
8️⃣ Send to the provided address
9️⃣ Receive automatic confirmation
help.faq:
*FAQ:*
❓ Is it safe? — Yes, 100%. ChangeNOW does not hold your funds.
❓ How long? — 2-30 min depending on the network.
❓ KYC? — No. No registration or verification.
❓ Fee? — Included in the displayed rate.

More questions? Contact support.

status_cmd.no_swaps:
📋 You have no active swaps.

Send *swap* to start one.
status_cmd.swap_detail:
📋 *Swap Detail*

ID: `{exchange_id}`
From: {from_amount} {from_currency} ({from_network})
To: {to_amount} {to_currency} ({to_network})
Status: {status}

Send *help* for more commands.

language.current:
🌐 Your current language: {language}

Available: es (Spanish), en (English), pt (Portuguese), fr (French)
language.invalid: ❌ Unsupported language. Use: en, es, pt, fr

errors.service_down: ⚠️ Service temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.rate_limit: ⏳ Rate limit: 5 swaps per hour. Please wait.
errors.invalid_choice: ❌ Invalid choice. Please select a valid number.
errors.generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Try again or use *help*.

• *admin stats* — Statistics
